hypothesis: Applying CAST—adding weighted combinations of concept embedding steering vectors learned by a concept bottleneck model to intermediate hidden activations of a frozen LLM—will enable conditional molecular generation that more accurately matches target properties (lower MAE and Best100MAE) while maintaining high validity, generative efficiency, novelty, and synthetic accessibility, outperforming simple activation-add baselines and matching or exceeding parameter-efficient and full fine-tuning approaches.
